files.patch:
@@ -1,117 +0,0 @@
-#!/usr/bin/env bash
-set -euo pipefail
-
-# Mint a GitHub App installation token without relying on a JavaScript action.
-
-app_id=""
-private_key="${PRIVATE_KEY:-}"
-owner=""
-repository=""
-api_url="${GITHUB_API_URL:-https://api.github.com}"
-
-while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
-  case "$1" in
-    --app-id)
-      app_id="$2"
-      shift 2
-      ;;
-    --owner)
-      owner="$2"
-      shift 2
-      ;;
-    --repository)
-      repository="$2"
-      shift 2
-      ;;
-    --api-url)
-      api_url="$2"
-      shift 2
-      ;;
-    *)
-      echo "Unknown argument: $1" >&2
-      exit 1
-      ;;
-  esac
-done
-
-if [[ -z "$app_id" ]]; then
-  echo "Usage: $0 --app-id <id> [--owner <org> | --repository <owner/repo>] [--api-url <url>]" >&2
-  exit 1
-fi
-
-if [[ -z "$owner" && -z "$repository" ]]; then
-  echo "Either --owner or --repository must be set" >&2
-  exit 1
-fi
-
-if [[ -z "$private_key" ]]; then
-  echo "PRIVATE_KEY environment variable must be set" >&2
-  exit 1
-fi
-
-if [[ -n "$repository" && "$repository" != */* ]]; then
-  echo "Repository must be in <owner/repo> form: $repository" >&2
-  exit 1
-fi
-
-b64url() {
-  openssl base64 -A | tr '+/' '-_' | tr -d '='
-}
-
-now="$(date +%s)"
-iat="$((now - 60))"
-exp="$((now + 540))"
-header='{"alg":"RS256","typ":"JWT"}'
-payload="$(printf '{\"iat\":%s,\"exp\":%s,\"iss\":\"%s\"}' "$iat" "$exp" "$app_id")"
-
-key_file="$(mktemp)"
-cleanup() {
-  rm -f "$key_file"
-}
-trap cleanup EXIT
-chmod 600 "$key_file"
-printf '%s' "$private_key" >"$key_file"
-
-unsigned_token="$(printf '%s' "$header" | b64url).$(printf '%s' "$payload" | b64url)"
-signature="$(printf '%s' "$unsigned_token" | openssl dgst -binary -sha256 -sign "$key_file" | b64url)"
-jwt="$unsigned_token.$signature"
-echo "::add-mask::$jwt"
-
-api_headers=(
-  -H "Authorization: Bearer $jwt"
-  -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json"
-  -H "X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2022-11-28"
-)
-
-if [[ -n "$repository" ]]; then
-  installation_json="$(curl -fsSL "${api_headers[@]}" "$api_url/repos/$repository/installation")"
-else
-  installation_json="$(curl -fsSL "${api_headers[@]}" "$api_url/orgs/$owner/installation")"
-fi
-installation_id="$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)["id"])' <<<"$installation_json")"
-
-if [[ -n "$repository" ]]; then
-  repo_name="${repository#*/}"
-  request_body="$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.dumps({"repositories": [sys.argv[1]]}))' "$repo_name")"
-  token_json="$(curl -fsSL -X POST "${api_headers[@]}" "$api_url/app/installations/$installation_id/access_tokens" -d "$request_body")"
-else
-  token_json="$(curl -fsSL -X POST "${api_headers[@]}" "$api_url/app/installations/$installation_id/access_tokens")"
-fi
-
-token="$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)["token"])' <<<"$token_json")"
-
-if [[ -z "$token" || "$token" == "null" ]]; then
-  echo "Failed to create a GitHub App installation token" >&2
-  exit 1
-fi
-
-echo "::add-mask::$token"
-
-if [[ -n "${GITHUB_OUTPUT:-}" ]]; then
-  {
-    echo "token=$token"
-    echo "installation-id=$installation_id"
-  } >>"$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
-else
-  printf '%s\n' "$token"
-fi

@@ -49,14 +49,11 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Generate app token
         id: app-token
-        env:
-          APP_ID: ${{ vars.TENZIR_GITHUB_APP_ID }}
-          PRIVATE_KEY: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}
-          TARGET_OWNER: tenzir
-        run: |
-          ./.github/scripts/create-app-token.sh \
-            --app-id "$APP_ID" \
-            --owner "$TARGET_OWNER"
+        uses: actions/create-github-app-token@v2
+        with:
+          app-id: ${{ vars.TENZIR_GITHUB_APP_ID }}
+          private-key: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}
+          owner: tenzir
 
       - name: Resolve target directory
         id: resolve
